positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical cosmic pattern composition featuring bioluminescent celestial flora and mythical faunal elements. The design must evoke an Art Nouveau aesthetic mixed with deep space surrealism. Central elements include stylized nebulae patterns, glowing crystalline coral formations, and majestic, intricate silhouettes of stylized space creatures (like griffin or leviathan tails) interwoven with flowing, organic arabesques. Use strong rim lighting and volumetric glow effects to ensure crisp, dark silhouettes against a vibrant gradient background of deep indigo, cosmic violet, and ethereal teal. The composition must be perfect for repeating apparel prints, with high contrast, clean linework, and no visible seams or breaks.
negative: blur, low resolution, jpeg artifacts, text, watermark, signature, amateur, ugly, tiling error, extra limbs, bad anatomy, grain, noise, distracting, photorealism, gradients
